calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Defendant Should Not Be Held In Contempt.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Anthony Cowan Should Not Be Held In Contempt is granted. Plaintiff shall make personal service of the Order To Show Cause no later than December 20, 2006 for a hearing date of January 22, 2007 at 10:30 a.m. in Room 612. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery, and for Sanctions: No opposition filed. Motion granted. Judgment Debtor Cowan shall serve full, verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] and Post-Judgment Request for Production of Documents [Set One] within 14 days of the hearing. Request for Sanctions denied. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT (612)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
